name: Mucin-containing minimal medium + 10 mM L-lactate (PMC10786315)
description: Mucin-containing minimal medium + 10 mM L-lactate — medium reported in PMC10786315 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC10786315 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — This IS a real, paper-defined growth medium (used for the C. jejuni 11168 growth assays in Fig. 4A/B and RT-qPCR in Fig. 6). Two corrections to the current record: (1) the carbon source must be L-lactate (BiGG lac__L / EX_lac__L_e), NOT D-lactate (lac__D) as currently stored — the paper text and figures consistently specify '10 mM L-lactate', so the isomer is wrong; (2) mucin is an intrinsic component of the medium ('mucin-containing minimal media') and belongs in the component list, not only in 'uncovered'. The full base minimal-medium salt formulation is described in the SI Appendix (PDF) referenced by the paper, which is NOT present in the provided XML, so I cannot enumerate the base salts; confidence is therefore 'low' for completeness. Oxygen: C. jejuni is microaerophilic and the growth/expression assays were run under microaerobic (low-O2) conditions (one RT-qPCR arm was anaerobic); 'aerobic' is the closest schema value but the true requirement is microaerobic — O2 should be provided at a low/limited level, not the 'facultative' currently stored. Do NOT treat this as a chemically-defined BiGG-mappable medium: it is a complex/undefined medium because of the mucin extract.
provenance.verification_evidence: We tested C. jejuni growth in mucin-containing minimal media supplemented with either 10 mM butyrate or 10 mM L-lactate and observed better growth with L-lactate in the media than with butyrate (Fig. 4A).

uncovered.name: mucin
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

oxygen_note: no oxygen requirement specified; O2 available but not asserted
